this game is terrible! n a new mode "the lava escape" in 4 days left they gave a notification "old game found" the current game and the old game i pressed the old game and they told you will lose your current game i pressed ok and when i looked at my fireworks they went from 908 to 608 and my diamonds went from 2398 to 1098 they did not give the whole information and i almost completed whole lava escape and now its all gone! not recomended! and improve your game

The game is a blatant copy of subway surfers, and is obviously designed to get money from kids. There are stupidly over priced items like characters and bundles which usually cost over 30$! Bundles usually cost over 60$! This game is definitely trying to steal money from parents, because there are ads a lot. It always is asking you to watch an ad to get something, which also shows that it is a game made the get money. You will eventually get bored of it, because there is a lack of creativity.

Recently downloaded this game after a long time and was severely disappointed. It's filled with ads. So many ads, in fact there's ads while playing as well. Whose idea was this to put ads during gameplay?? And also the home screen looks messy and filled with big ad buttons which are annoying to look at. Immediately deleted
the game is filled to the brim with ads and more then half of them don't give rewards for example watching ads for revives it just doesn't work.

I remember this game being so much fun but coming back to it was miserable. If you so much as open and close a menu you get ads. I desperately searched for a way to get rid of them, even if I had to pay, but the only solution seems to be shutting off WiFi (I mobile game while listening to YouTube so this is not an option) Even worse is that, even when muted, it will override sound permissions and forcefully pause background sound for no reason. Don't waste your energy on this hunk of junk.

I had 40k+ gold bars and almost 90 dynamites. But after updating to the latest version I lost all of that!!! How did that happen ? Also I don't know if this is just me, but the runway has suddenly become very foggy. You cannot see upcoming vehicles and other obstacles at all, which is very unfortunate. So please fix this ASAP.

This was a good game at first, until I realized it wasn't. First of all, I don't understand why my sister's account got do many perks. For example: she doesn't have to wait for the silver vault's cool down, she can instantly open it. She can buy a silver vault for only 300 gold bars while I need to pay 2000 of them, she can buy the diamond vault from the shop for 20 dynamites. Then the second thing is that in the raccoon dungeon thing, I can't beat the raccoon at the end. I try to click buticant

This game is fun! But most of the characters cost real money and in my opinion that is a problem that I think ever player dislikes. Why is it a problem in my opinion? I really want to unlock Super Angela. But that costs real money. The reason I think every player dislikes it is because they want unlock a character that cost real money. So make the all of the characters free PLEASE.

star_2.text: The game is very fun and the controls are great. It does glitch sometimes. Also ads pop up out of nowhere. The lucky cards DO NOT WORK. Also can you add a second run and character for the brown dog,Ben. I think the wierdest thing though is that you have to pay one hundred dollars for a King Cat that has 2 free saves per round. 100$?! Once I pressed"save me" and watched a ad it didn't even save me. The worst part is that it's so hard that I didn't even catch the robber yet. I've played years.

The game is pretty good but the character models are huge and completely block the screen from seeing what is coming if you jump in the middle lane, this becomes a huge problem later on when the speed of the game is very fast. Just make the characters smaller or give a wider field of view so that I can see what's coming even though I jump in the middle lane. I don't face this issue in other infinite runners.

I like it . It is good for stress releasing . I like unlock characters and collecting bombs. But the bad thing is that in ROAD TO REWARDS and any other reward path sometimes add come and sometimes not. but it's good . it's highly recommended 👌.

overall the game is good but the ads are so flipping annoying, like after every match u have to watch an ad or pay 10 pounds just to not have ads bro all of the talking tom gold rush, hero rush, and tom time rush need to get a life, who ask to pay even for playing, like what the hell. u guys better take it down or downfall is near.
This is 💕good to perfect 💯👍of runner 🏃to race and runing to road is okey.

It was a really good game before, I like this game really much. But, in this new update, there was a glitch, so at certain times I run somewhere and the screen goes white, and sometimes pink, brown and blue as well and now we can't see anything in our way, so we get a game over soon. Even our free Save Me doesn't undo the glitch. Please fix this glitch so we can play this again. Thanks.

I actually enjoy this game. But the only reason why is because it is a subway surfers rip off. They just took the game and pretty much turned the theme to talking Tom. Subway surfers have cooler features: seasons, events now, lots of limited time skins and many more. Although it didn't entirely copy subway surfers. It has some other features like a helmet, 2xgold and you get a pretty big gold reward each time you go far. But for me, it still is too close to subway surfers.

Has a few features to make it different from Subway Surfers, but locks them all behind paywalls really fast. You can get to x20 multiplier, unlock one character and one level before having your progress blocked by some purchases that require Gems (I got there in under 20 minutes), which you can only get through convoluted, poorly disguised paid mechanics. The running is not bad, better than other clones and Subway Surfers itself, except for the odd, zoomed in camera. Too bad it is so greedy.

Hmm this used to be better. It's like the movements can't keep up with mine. Not necessarily a lag but kinda. It's better on my iPad definitely no lag or anything. I also thought with the new character there'd be a house for her too but nope. Disappointing. I'll stick with my iPad or Kindle because I can play on both and there isn't a lag issue. Weird.

I really can't understand what's happening. when I first started using this It was fine, it was really fun but now it gets stuck every time I play the race and ruins the whole mood. It lags a lot while playing the race and while it's lagging the character doesn't move the way I swipe due to which I end up being in the third place. First I thought this was happening cause of bad Wifi connection but now I have a stable Wifi connection and the game still lags when it's connected with the internet.

Like the runner genre, dislike how it implemented. First I don't like the clunky movement of the cast. It's kinda awkward to move them at such a fast speed. And it's almost impossible anyway to watch the road at high speed because the fog is short. Next thing I really hate is the safe feature. You need diamond to progress. You can get them from either leaderboard (very grindy) or safe (waiting). So yeah I stuck most of the time because diamond is such a hard item to get.

this game is good. But I have one problem. Just about five minutes ago, I was playing and I just st beat my highscore, I had 150,000 gold and then, the app just shut down, I love it all my progress and I've got to do it again. Please fix this, this is frequently happening. Edit: I didn't get all that back. I also just started another chase and after only 80 gold, the game shut down again

Hello, I doubt anyone is going to read this but I don't really mind, I'm just writing for fun. Why can't the developers of this game get an ending? I've finished all the places, and there's no ending. Would've been better if you made a new realm for us to start all over and chase the racoon. 2 stars for effort but in all it was just an unfinished game. There's a fair amount of ads, which I like, and also the event, and race mode but overall I hated that there was no ending for our hard work and It took me more than 1 month to finish this game.

The game is buggy, intentionally or accidentally: it happened twice that it reset the daily mission streak, while we were at day 25, and 29, respectively. It just "forgot" the number of accomplished missions and we had to start over from day 1. Quite annyoing. Other than that, it's an enjoyable and totally mindless killtime.

Would be Best runner sim if it didn't have full-screen ads that sometimes crash my app. Playing this with data disabled I lose out its multiplayer content. Also the game would be better if the main map was the one you choose at the beginning and it could be changed only by entering tunnels.

star_3.text: Overall it's your typical endless running game, but with chibi versions of the Talking Tom characters. I've noticed that with the events, it's possible to get characters from the store, which is great for me since I have no intention of spending money on this. I have little difficulty leveling up (although getting enough gold bars and diamonds to fully deck out Farmer Ginger's house is no joke), and by completing the daily challenges and collecting the vaults, it's pretty straightforward.

The game is fun. However I do have a few complaints. 1. When I play with my stylus, the game will sometimes not move and I will die. 2. There are too many ads. There is one every time after I die. Even when I say no to watch an and ad to revive myself, it still shows me an ad anyway. 3. Sometimes when I try to exit an ad, it takes me to the play store or website of the ad. 4. One of the ads' timers completely stops at 10 seconds. This game needs some fixes but other than that, it's pretty good.

This is my childhood game and I love it, but y'all have to stop being so money hungry. The wooden vault used to be free and I could open it every ~5-6 hours. Now I'd have to watch an ad to do so. And Becca, the new character, should have her own levels, not replace Neon Angela. Reinstalling this game and seeing Neon Angela replaced by Becca was heartbreaking, since that level, along with that version of Angela, were my favourite. Aside from that, the game is pretty enjoyable

It is a good game. But while playing it suddenly comes refresh and because of all that it becomes very difficult to be sure but it a network free game but if we want add to continue so we need network

A time killer. Quick and easy gameplay with a simple but fun concept. Despite what some reviews mention, I do not find ads to be a bother, as they do not intervene with gameplay, only occasionally popping up at the end of a run. Gets boring fast, needs more levels, finished game in around nine hours. Not much of a challenge, I reccomend this to smaller children to keep them occupied, though all ages can enjoy this great game. Three stars, fun, quick, easy, but gets boring after time.
too many ads! 5 stars if they add the option to purchase no ads permanently no subscription. game otherwise is great

The game is amazing and I love to play it but the problem is in road to rewards there is a watch ad option whenever I click on it immediately says that try again later no ad now then I click on it another time it says the same thing every time this very bad thing in this game
I liked it, but when I was playing with no Wi-Fi, I'm still getting ads, could you please fix it and remove the coin boost please?

As a person that has played this game for 2 years straight. I say that it became worse everytime I play the game. 1. Too many ads, 2. glitching everytime I die, 3. Characters are just reskined, like firemen ginger is the same thing as ginger, 4. P2W reskined characters and planes, 5. Lagging my phone with so many ads (ads to respawn is fine). Half of the times the ads aren't appreciate for children. It shown inappropriate ads with things I cannot say.

Like this game and it's mechanics... But the movements lacks the necessary oomph it just doesn't feel natural, and a major let down - the jumping! if you are jumping off of some high place like a truck your player sometimes doesn't jump and if you try to rectify it by jumping early you hit the next platform face first, which ruins the experience, those colliders need a major fixing. Love the PvP aspect though it's a great addition.

This game is so awesome! Except the ads. There are way too many ads! Most of the ads are 30 secs. Few of them are 15 secs. Bit of them are 5 secs. Ridiculous! Unfair! The other things are good. And you have to buy to get no ads.(Outfit7, do not make the ads to 45 secs or 1 minute or I will put 1star (0 stars if possible)) Just prepare to get lots of ads on this game.

It is a good app overall, however they could lessen the amount of overall ads because its ridiculously high and looks set to skyrocket. They could also minimise the amount that you have to wait for a vault to open. 6 hours is way, way too much. The in-app purchases aren't any better either. There's loads of them. So with that in mind, let's make sure there is 3 things you need to get that require an advert and/or purchase. Temple Run 2 remains king, but this is still exceptional.

After building all the houses the only fun the game has to offer is the race game and don't forget to drink water game but it's unfortunate that it is given once in 24hrs. So overtime the game has become very boring. Let the race and water game come more often so we can alternate and also include the bomb game. Just make it more interesting One more thing sometimes it stops when entering the tunnel

This game is fun and a little addictive, however, the characters don't always move according to direction and there's sometimes lag in the game play. The stage building system relies on gold, diamonds, and dynamite... sadly, the game never gives an amount in diamonds to do anything worthwhile past the second building stage.

star_4.text: Decent game. Alot like subway surfers, alough I honestly prefer this. It's easy to use and control, I like the different environments to run in and it is smooth controlling the characters. I really only have a few complaints, one of them is that there are SO MANY ADDS and they are kind of overwhelming. Another thing I didn't like is the things like purchases in game or the way you upgrade to other levels. The in game purchases are a bit much and it's not exactly pay to win but it's close.

Very addictive, fun, and cute game, also there's a fair amount of ads! The only problem is how long it takes to load at the starting, it usually takes like 5 minutes to load on a regular basis! Sometimes it takes up to 15 minutes, and sometimes it doesn't even load so I have to restart my tablet! If you could make it load in like a minute or two then I would give this a 5-star review, but for now I give this 4 stars.

It's time for the character selection to change to be similar to Tom Hero Run, where you first pick the character, and then scroll through the many outfits. The musical motifs get repetitive after a while, especially the music in Tom's Home, but unlike Subway Surfers, the variety in music and gameplay as you switch between worlds during the same run makes this superior. The gameplay and graphics are not too difficult, absolutely not janky, and just well done and enjoyable.

Other than that, the game is addictive and is one of the games my son keeps returning to - despite probably having downloaded a thousand others (no exaggeration here).

Nice app, might even be better than Talking Tom Hero Dash one. Actually, I'm not sure. I like the racing option, and building the talking friend's land (Though I wish they would make it a little more creative) Way better than Subway Surfers. Also, a portal to other places! Why I put a 4 is because, it needs some work. Talking Tom is a popular one, it has several games of it, also the youtube videos. the game should be updated with more & new features. But, it's a nice app overall. :)))

it is a wonderful game I like the graphics and the areas I would say the problem is the ads they are annoying but the game still is incredible I love this game this is one of my favorite running games its so good 🥰🥳🥳🥳

star_5.text: This game is totally awesome and you need to play this. Lets start with the gameplay, this game is an intense dash while you stop a racoon and grab the gold that drops from his bag and use that to upgrade houses! Now the purchases, there are many characters you are able to buy and many you buy with your gold. I dont want you to buy the characters because they are really easy to get in event's.

I really do love this game, but it is just like subway surfer, and I like this one another better. It has a cute chibi like art style, And is a good game to destract kids. It has variety in character option and location making it even more fun! But I have never caught the robber, and I've been playing for years! Also, I love how you get to collect things like, let's say flowers, and then you can buy characters, it's a fun way to keep ppls interest in your game. Also, a fair amount of ads! Bye!

Forget Subway Surfers, THIS is the game you want to download. This game is so underrated, I mean, only half of SS's downloads and it somehow manages to be, dare I say, 10x better! It has different themed locations so you never get bored of a single spot, each with their own obstacles! Not to mention the boss battles you have with the robber. Jake and Chief could never even COMPARE. There's so much more I could talk about, but I'm nearing the character count. But, I can say KEEP IT UP, OUTFIT7!

Looking for a good game? Well, you came to the right place! This is honestly a great game! The controls, the gameplay, the characters, fair amount of adds, and most importantly.. (for me) the game didn't glich/ crash! So yeah I would really recommend this game. It is super fun to play- I could ligit play it for hours- I also really like to build in this game! I think it's pretty creative and fun. I love to upgrade my houses to see their final forms. I also LOVE getting new areas. Play now ! 👍

I like that you have to chase bad guys aka raccoons. I like all the different costumes and tunnels you have to go through. I've played this game many times and I would recommend to anyone needing a time killer. It's simple to understand and simple to pass through levels. The controls are extremely easy as well! I rate five stars and highly recommend.

I Love this game ❤️. I’ve been playing since 2018, and it was released on July 3rd, 2016 , the game never feels old to me. Chasing the robber, grabbing gold bars, and upgrading houses is seriously addictive in a fun way 😄✨. It’s simple, exciting, and my go-to game whenever I need quick positivity after long days 🎮🌟 Outfit7 really released a masterpiece and did a really great job 👍🔥💯🎉

This is one of the best App I've ever played. The ones you were going for the gold when you hit the "Go" button is much easy. The upgrades is easy to find the Gold and Gems. and the online race is so much fun whether you connect to the internet. the quest is amazing to get the rewards and the event is great just to see it for the update in the coming weeks. I love this game and hopefully you can play it again sometimes.

Talking Tom Gold Run is a fun, fast-paced endless runner with colorful graphics and smooth controls. Chasing the raccoon, upgrading homes, and unlocking characters keep the game engaging. It’s easy to play, kid-friendly, and perfect for quick sessions, though ads can interrupt at times.
